column1: These modifiers affect UI/content but do NOT create new combination IDs. They are tracked in Sheet 1 but detailed here.
• Min Participation is now tracked at COMPONENT level (TopUp, Secondary, Add-ons) - NOT policy level
• Base plan NEVER has min participation (employer-provided, auto-enrolled) - hence V20 removed
• These columns remain in Sheet 1 for reference but behavior is per-component, not per-combination
